title: Y@rubbesheth #3380
definition:
Jerubbesheth = "shame will contend"

 1) a variant name of Jerubbaal (the other name of Gideon [\\03378\\])
    substituting the word 'shame' for the name of the pagan god 'Baal'
nasbUsage:

 1) a variant name of Jerubbaal (the other name of Gideon [\\03378\\])
    substituting the word 'shame' for the name of the pagan god 'Baal'
